messages.body: Hi, I bought the Pro plan on May 31 and would like a refund. We tried it for our operations team, but it is not the right fit. Please process the refund back to the original card.

We are a VIP customer and your export outage blocked our morning executive report. This is the third issue this quarter. I want a manager involved today, and I want to know what credit or refund you are offering before we renew.
Hello, we are evaluating tools for a 12-person care coordination team. Can you send pricing for 12 seats and let me know whether you support annual billing?
Our renewal is coming up next month. Can you confirm whether our current Pro plan discount carries over, or should we expect different renewal pricing?
Thanks for the pricing information. Friday July 17 at 2:00 PM Central works for our demo. Please include my teammate Dana at dana@brightpath.example.
Could we schedule a 30-minute product demo this Friday, July 17 at 1:00 PM Central? If that is not open, please send a couple of nearby options.
